title: Recycle Symbols: Copy & Paste ♻ ♲ Recycling & Eco Signs
meta_description: Copy and paste recycle symbols — the universal recycling sign (♻), plastic resin codes (♳–♹), and eco and environment glyphs. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The universal recycling sign, plastic resin codes, and eco-friendly glyphs in one place. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The recycling arrows are among the most recognizable symbols in the world, and Unicode encodes a full set of them. This library gathers the universal recycling signs, the numbered plastic resin-identification codes (♳ through ♹) used on packaging, and the green eco and environment glyphs for sustainability content. Click any character to copy it for labels, posts, or product descriptions.

sections.label: Recycling
sections.intro: The universal recycling symbol and its black, generic, and paper variants.

sections.label: Resin Codes
sections.intro: The numbered resin-identification codes stamped on plastics, types 1 through 7.

sections.label: Eco & Nature
sections.intro: Green, plant, and planet glyphs for sustainability and environmental content.

related.desc: Cause and awareness ribbon symbols in every color and meaning.

related.desc: Sun, cloud, rain, snow, and other weather-related Unicode symbols.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.
